content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event type and context**: This is a PULL_REQUEST event where I've been asked to review an automated PR that regenerates static assets (HTML pages, browser app data, etc.) after gene review or template changes.

b. **Request type**: This is a code review request - the user wants feedback on code quality, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. **Key information**:
   - PR has massive changes: +537,811 additions, -1,468,660 deletions across 100 files
   - It's an automated regeneration of static assets (HTML pages, browser app data)
   - Generated 1322 gene review HTML pages, 89 project pages, updated browser app data.js
   - This is from an automated workflow that triggers on changes to gene YAML files, schema, templates, or rendering code

d. **Main tasks**: 
   - Review the automated generation process and output quality
   - Check for potential issues in the generated files
   - Assess the changes for security, performance, and best practices
   - Verify the regeneration appears to be working correctly

e. **Plan**:
   - Read a few sample generated HTML files to understand the output quality
   - Check the browser app data.js changes
   - Look at the repository structure and generation process
   - Provide feedback on the automated generation approach
   - Note: This is primarily generated content, so traditional code review focuses more on the generation process and output quality rather than manual code changes

f. **Limitations**: Since this is mostly generated content, I'll focus on reviewing the output quality and generation process rather than detailed code logic review.
</analysis>

input.body: ## PR Review: Automated Asset Regeneration Reviewing this automated regeneration PR for code quality, security, performance, and potential issues. ### Todo List - [ ] Analyze the scope and nature of the changes - [ ] Sample review of generated HTML files - [ ] Check browser app data.js changes - [ ] Review generation process and output quality - [ ] Assess security and performance implications - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24695636874)
